item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"I married the woodpecker in jest."

You have written more immortal, unique sentences than any one writer should be capable of. So. Many. Sentences.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was really fun and makes me excited for stuff to come. The first interview, in particular, was quite clever.

EDIT: One thing I noticed, the designation SCP-4683-A is used both for people who eat SCP-4683-1 and the Orchardist. Is this intentional?

item.title: Site Criticism Team - Review
item.content:encoded:
Typically, I'm a bit hesitant when something is left open-ended. Here, however, I believe there is enough to make this its own article. The lead-in to Black Autumn III is isolated and doesn't require much support from the rest of the article, which is crammed with fun imagery. I particularly liked the 4th of July non-incident.

The pacing here is great, the imagery evoked is clear and imaginative, and this is just good ol' fashioned fun. An easy upvote from me.

So. Many. Badgers.— Dr. Tristan Bailey

Typical Wisconsin.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I greatly enjoyed reading through the incident logs. Very well written and interesting.

item.title: What's Present is Prologue. What's past is Author Commentary.
item.content:encoded:
As some of you might know, for the last two years, I've written a series of Halloween Tales known as Black Autumn, set in the S & C Plastics canon.

This year, I'm making a third, though a bit different in nature— instead of just being set in Sloth's Pit, it will have more of a global setting, featuring several Nexuses around the world. And who knows, it may even cross over with other things. I know I plan on having something to do with War on All Fronts.

Self-indulgent? Definitely.

Fun to write? Absolutely.

And most importantly? Open to collaboration. If anyone wants in on this, just poke me on IRC, preferably on Wednesday/Thursday.

See you in October.

Thanks to everyone who critted this, including:

DrChandra
Mistopheles
DrAkimoto
UraniumEmpire
